research_text: James Okafor has led Meridian Health Sciences since 2020 and has taken the company from Series B to pre-commercial stage. He has a background in pharma commercialization from his time at two large pharmaceutical companies. He has publicly discussed the cost and reputational impact of late-stage trademark conflicts in drug naming, noting that one recent incident cost the company seven figures and delayed their brand launch by three months. He is focused on de-risking the commercialization path for their lead asset.

company_context.current_product: Trademark Search, Screening, and Brand Protection
company_context.company_notes: Corsearch is the global leader in trademark clearance, brand protection, and IP enforcement. Trusted by over 5,000 brands across pharma, FMCG, tech, and retail. We help IP teams eliminate risk from similar marks before filing, monitor live infringement, and act on counterfeits at scale.
